description:
Calculate the 2-hour drift (Datum) for a disabled kayaker using the provided incident data and document the vector mathematics in /home/ga/Documents/drift_analysis.txt. Using the calculated Datum, create a Bridge Command scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/s) Solent SAR Kayak/ consisting of an environment.ini (StartTime=15:00, WindDirection=315, WindSpeed=20, Weather=3, VisibilityRange=5.0), an ownship.ini (rescue vessel at 50° 46.5' N, 001° 18.0' W), and an othership.ini (target vessel at the calculated Datum).

Incident Data:
- Last Known Position (LKP): 50° 46.5' N, 001° 18.0' W
- Incident Time: 13:00 Local
- Search Start Time: 15:00 Local (Drift Duration: 2.0 hours)
- Wind: From North-West (315° True) at 20 knots
- Current: Setting (flowing towards) 100° True at 1.5 knots
- Target: Sea Kayak (Leeway Factor: 3% of Wind Speed, Divergence: 0°)
